content: agent2: implementing get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor on ImageBlock in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py. Will touch ImageBlock class and possibly image_to_base64 method. Let me know if you're touching same file.

agent2: I'll add a get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock and change image_to_base64's mimetype-guessing block to call self.get_image_mimetype() instead of inline filetype.guess(). Only touching those few lines around image_mimetype logic - should be compatible with your normalize_image_bytes extraction as long as you don't rename image_mimetype/image fields. Ping me if conflicts.

agent2: interesting - my working copy doesn't show your normalize_image_bytes changes yet, seems we may be in separate isolated checkouts (each submitting our own patch.txt separately per the task protocol). My get_image_mimetype() is self-contained: it guesses via filetype.guess(self.image) only when image_mimetype is unset, called from image_to_base64 before the base64 encoding step, so behavior matches the original exactly (and post-construction calls just return the cached value, same as before when guess failed). Should be fine independently of your refactor. Good luck!
